definition: to become less intense or widespread
The storm finally began to abate.
(Of a monarch) renounce one's throne.
The king decided to abdicate his throne.
to take someone away illegally by force

detest; strongly dislike
She truly abhors violence in any form.
to exist in large numbers or amounts
The rivers here abound with fish and other wildlife.
to agree to a demand, request, or treaty

make more noticeable or prominent.

officially recognize or authorize

be received by someone in regular or increasing amounts over time

To free someone from a criminal charge by a verdict of not guilty

to cause (a machine or device) to operate

to confuse or muddle (someone's mind)

to consider or declare to be true or the case

decorate

to distress or treat unfairly

claim without proof

make suffering less severe

to combine or unite to form one organization or structure

to make (something bad or unsatisfactory) better

increase the volume of (sound), especially using an amplifier; enlarge upon or add details to (a story or statement)

bring to life; give spirit to

To destroy completely.

to declare invalid (an official agreement, decision, or result)

to greatly dismay or horrify

to arrest; to understand

to call or bring (someone) before a court to answer a criminal charge

attribute something to (a cause, source, or author)

to draw (fluid) by suction from a body cavity; to pronounce with an audible breath

to direct one's hopes or ambitions towards achieving something

to surprise greatly

to make amends or reparation

to reduce the force, effect, or value of

hesitate or be unwilling to accept an idea or undertaking; (in baseball) an illegal motion by a pitcher

(of something bad) happen to (someone)

to charm or enchant someone, sometimes in a deceptive way

see or observe (a thing or person, especially a remarkable or impressive one)

to besiege; to trouble persistently

Puzzle, confuse, or bewilder.

secretly allow (something immoral, illegal, or harmful) to occur

ward off (a weapon or attack) with a countermove

make (something) continue indefinitely

to read carefully

to work diligently at; to travel regularly over a route

to assume as fact; to put forward as a basis for argument

suggest or assume the existence of

It's important not to preconceive notions about people before you meet them.

to state, affirm, or assert something about the subject of a sentence or argument

be the strongest or main element; be greater in number or amount

to exist before something else

to make known by open declaration; to proclaim

reproduce or spread

extend beyond or above a surface

to remove or cleanse

reconcile

imagine again or anew

be born again in another body

send money or cancel a punishment

formally declare one's abandonment of (a claim, right, or possession)

revoke, cancel, or repeal (a law, order, or agreement)

revive (someone) from unconsciousness or apparent death

to keep; to hold

run with short, quick steps; sink (one's own ship)

to isolate or hide away; to take legal possession of

having or forming a jagged edge like a saw

to avoid

to distort, to bias

to extract metal from its ore by heating

lead (an attack or movement); be the leader of.

to hold (someone's attention) completely as though by magic

to describe or regard as worthy of disgrace or great disapproval

depict or treat in a mannered and nonrealistic style.

bring under domination or control

to support (an organization or activity) financially

to provide evidence to support or prove the truth of

spread through or over

charge with an additional amount of power or energy

to conduct electricity with zero resistance

to take the place of (someone or something previously in authority or use)

to forcibly put an end to; to prevent the development or action of

to combine, to create

contaminate; spoil

diminish or reduce in thickness toward one end

to grow teeth; to provide with teeth

to attempt to persuade people of the merits of

to go beyond the limits of

occur; happen; (of a secret, etc.) be revealed.

not to deter or discourage
